goal: Make the model both understand scrt concepts (mind-palace, simhash, traversal) AND operate it competently — conceptual + operational fluency.
audience: Users driving scrt over a project's own corpus + mpg palace
difficulty: mixed — conceptual grounding through to operational flag/tool mastery
notes:
Requested new modalities (NOT yet implemented): 'skill ingestion' and 'reasoning step modification' — capture as backlog.
FEATURE REQUEST (mpg follow-up): the CLI should take a project DIRECTORY, auto-detect an initialized mpg/.mpg palace in it, and build the corpus + data refs from that project automatically (point-at-a-project workflow), instead of requiring corpus_dir + palace_path to be configured by hand.
Exclusions: treat the three concrete picks (destructive, prose trivia, hallucinated flags/tools) as binding; 'no exclusions' was mutually exclusive and overridden.
